title: Spark Culture Configuration
description: Defines the supported languages and default language for a MintPlayer Spark application. Place this file at App_Data/culture.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

languages.description: Map of language codes to their translated display names. Each key is an ISO language code (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and each value is a TranslatedString providing the language name in all supported languages.

defaultLanguage.description: The default language code to use when no user preference is set (e.g., 'en').

TranslatedString.description: A translated string where keys are ISO language codes (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and values are the translated text.
